notes: Stub agent config for L45 continuous profiling evidence — not a production sidecar.
On-demand unix CPU protobuf sampling landed in Wave-27 (#232); this stub polls the same loopback surface.
push_backend http_soft posts retained .pb samples when SL_PROFILE_PUSH_URL is set; unset URL or -DryRun skips network (hermetic SelfCheck never opens sockets).
push_backend none disables export entirely. Full Pyroscope/OTLP clients remain unpaid.
Windows hosts skip CPU sampling (pprof-rs needs SIGPROF); CI agent job is ubuntu-only soft evidence (continue-on-error).
Scheduled soft job delegates to scripts/continuous-profiling-agent.ps1 and reuses pprof-smoke contracts.
